# MuleSoft APIkit

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (4.x) of APIkit documentation.
> See [APIkit llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/apikit/llms-full.txt) for all the APIkit documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Display a Typed SOAP Fault](https://docs.mulesoft.com/apikit/latest/apikit-4-display-fault-task.md)
- [APIkit for GraphQL](https://docs.mulesoft.com/apikit/latest/apikit-4-for-graphql.md)
